subcodes.first_line: O Captain of the hosts of certitude! Though the armies of bodies be as fierce as lions and mighty as leopards, yet their aspirations are directed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سالار سپاه ایقان لشکر اجسام اگرچه چون هژبر و ضرغام باشند ولی همتشان متوجه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual warfare; struggle, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @living waters; water of life
